deploy.startCommand: echo '=== STEP 1: Migrations ===' && alembic -c alembic/alembic.ini upgrade head 2>&1 && echo '=== STEP 2: Loading settings ===' && python -c 'from app.config import get_settings; s=get_settings(); print("env=", s.app_env, "debug=", s.app_debug)' && echo '=== STEP 3: Importing app.main ===' && python -c 'import app.main; print("main imported OK")' && echo '=== STEP 4: Starting uvicorn ===' && exec uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port $PORT --log-level debug
